# RivalDrop

> Seven AI analysts watch your competitors, your reputation, and your market. One short email every Monday tells you the three moves worth making this week. Built for Shopify brands; a separate /local product serves Kansas City small businesses.

## What we offer
RivalDrop is a competitive-intelligence system for Shopify brands. Seven analysts run continuously:
- Price Watch
- Restock Pulse
- Reputation Radar
- New Entrant Scanner
- Ad and creative tracking
- Catalog and SKU drift
- Customer-language and review-theme drift

You get one Monday email with the three highest-impact moves for the week.

## Who it's for
- Shopify brands doing $500K to $20M in annual revenue.
- Founders or marketing leads who want one high-signal weekly briefing instead of a dashboard nobody opens.

## How it works
1. Onboard: tell us your competitors, your category, your geo. Takes 15 minutes.
2. Each week, the seven analysts run. Drift, restocks, price moves, reputation shifts get scored.
3. Monday morning, one email lands. Three moves, ranked by impact, with the evidence behind each.

## Pricing
Pricing varies by competitor count and analyst depth. Start at the [services page](https://rivaldrop.com/services/) or contact us for a quote.

## RivalDrop /local
A separate product for Kansas City brick-and-mortar small businesses. Same idea, different competitors. See https://rivaldrop.com/local/.
